title: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Manish Jalhotra

dkjkxkj] frgkM+] ubZ fnYYkh esa jksdk tk, rFkk vfHkj{kk esa j[kk tk, rkfd Hkfo"; esa eky dh rLdjh djus ls mUgs jksdk tk lds A 2- tcfd dsUæ ljdkj ds ikl ;g fo'okl djus ds dkj.k gSa fd iwoksZDr O;fDr HkxksM+k gS ;k vius dks fNik;s gq, gS rkfd vkns'k rkehy u fd;k tk lds A 3- vr% vc] mDr vf/fu;e dh /kjk 7 dh mi&/kjk (1) ds [k.M ([k) }kjk iznÙk 'kfDr;ksa dk iz;ksx djrs gq, dsUæ ljdkj ,rn~}kjk iwoksZDr O;fDr dks funs'k nsrh gS fd ljdkjh jkti=k esa bl vkns'k ds izdk'ku dh frfFk ls lkr fnu ds vanj og iqfyl vk;qDr] fnYyh ds lkeus mifLFkr gks A ¹iQk- la- 673@25@2013&dLVe&VIIIº gjehr ,l- ¯lg] la;qDr lfpo 2237 GI/2014 (1) MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) (CENTRAL ECONOMIC INTELLIGENCE BUREAU) (COFEPOSA UNIT) ORDER New Delhi, the 28th May, 2014 S.O. 1412(E).—Whereas the Joint Secretary to the Government of India, specially empowered under sub- section (1) of Section 3 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities (COFEPOSA) Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) issued order F.No.673/ 25/2013-Cus.VIII, dated 16.04.2014 under the said sub- section directing that Shri Manish Jalhotra, R/o 52/25, Karol Bagh, 4th Floor, Ramjus Road, New Delhi, be detained and kept in custody in the Central Jail, Tihar, New Delhi with a view to preventing him from smuggling the goods in future. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or has been concealing himself so that the order cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Commissioner of Police, Delhi within 7 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 673/25/2013-Cus. VIII] HARMEET S. SINGH, Jt. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or has been concealing himself so that the order cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Commissioner of Police Delhi, within 7 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 673/26/2013-Cus. VIII] HARMEET S. SINGH, Jt. Secy. -- 2 of 2 --
